ses.receiptrule.action.AddHeaderAction.Docs: Adds a header to the received email.

ses.receiptrule.action.BounceAction.Docs: Rejects the received email by returning a bounce response to the sender and, optionally, publishes a notification to Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).

ses.receiptrule.action.LambdaAction.Docs: Calls an AWS Lambda function, and optionally, publishes a notification to Amazon SNS.

ses.receiptrule.action.S3Action.Docs: Saves the received message to an Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3) bucket and, optionally, publishes a notification to Amazon SNS.

ses.receiptrule.action.SNSAction.Docs: Publishes the email content within a notification to Amazon SNS.

ses.receiptrule.action.StopAction.Docs: Terminates the evaluation of the receipt rule set and optionally publishes a notification to Amazon SNS.

ses.receiptrule.action.WorkmailAction.Docs: Calls Amazon WorkMail and, optionally, publishes a notification to Amazon Amazon SNS.
